x-enumeration-literals.name: Functional Consistency Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Test to confirm production behaviors match intended usage patterns

x-enumeration-literals.name: Resiliency and Performance Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Test to confirm the service availability and response times meet agreed service levels

x-enumeration-literals.name: Processing Error and Integrity Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Test to confirm errors and product/service failure rates are within allowed limits

x-enumeration-literals.name: Usability Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: Test to confirm facilities are easily identifiable, service availability is resilient and access is sufficiently intuitive to users
